name: moraine
description: Codex plugin for Moraine MCP session search, realtime agent awareness, and sanitized bug reports.

interface.longDescription: Connects Codex to Moraine MCP session search, realtime agent awareness, and bundled guidance for recovering prior agent context or preparing sanitized Moraine bug reports.
defaultPrompt: Search my past agent sessions with Moraine.
Check what another agent is doing now.
Find prior context for this issue.
Prepare a sanitized Moraine bug report.
